name: City of London

budgetCategories.label: Environment & Streets
budgetCategories.description: Waste, street cleaning, parks and environmental health.

budgetCategories.description: Core staff, finance, IT, legal and democratic services.

budgetCategories.description: Planning applications, building control and local development.

budgetCategories.description: Care and support for older and disabled adults.

budgetCategories.label: Children's Social Care
budgetCategories.description: Support and safeguarding for children, young people and families.

budgetCategories.label: Public Health

feedItems.description: allocated £10.5m to Council Running Costs (≈£694 per resident)
allocated £46.6m to Culture & Leisure (≈£3086 per resident)
allocated £17.3m to Environment & Streets (≈£1142 per resident)
allocated £179.5m to Other Services (≈£11881 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £56 (4.6%) to £1274
